description: SCOR Exposure Domains. Reference galaxy for the five exposure domains of the METEORSTORM threat model (Quick Guide Table 2.2): Kinetic, Non-kinetic, Electronic Warfare (EW), Cyber Warfare, and Other (environmental). Applied orthogonally to the SCOR layer schema. Reference-galaxy UUIDs are immutable; the five values are intentionally stable.
name: SCOR Exposure Domain
